name: Dark Turbo Charge Donkey Kong
description: Dark Turbo Charge Donkey Kong is the Dark counterpart of Turbo Charge Donkey Kong in Skylanders: SuperChargers. His signature vehicle is the Dark Barrel Blaster.
biography: Dark Turbo Charge Donkey Kong is the Dark counterpart of Turbo Charge Donkey Kong in Skylanders: SuperChargers. His signature vehicle is the Dark Barrel Blaster.
personality: As a Dark SuperCharger, he possesses a more intense and brooding nature compared to his standard counterpart, while retaining his legendary strength and loyalty.

story.content: Dark Turbo Charge Donkey Kong is the Dark counterpart of Turbo Charge Donkey Kong in Skylanders: SuperChargers. Having been infused with Dark Rift Engines, he possesses enhanced abilities and a signature vehicle known as the Dark Barrel Blaster.

trivia: Dark Turbo Charge Donkey Kong is the Dark counterpart of Turbo Charge Donkey Kong.
His signature vehicle is the Dark Barrel Blaster.
He was released as part of the Wii U Dark Edition Starter Pack for Skylanders: SuperChargers.
As a guest character, he is only playable on Nintendo platforms.

trailers.name: Dark Turbo Charge Donkey Kong Character Trailer

gameplay: Dark Turbo Charge Donkey Kong uses a combination of brute strength and barrel-based attacks to overcome his foes. He can transition into his Super Donkey Kong form for increased power and utilizes Bongo Barrels for area-of-effect damage.

basic.name: Primate Punch
basic.content: DK delivers a powerful punch to enemies.

basic.name: Barrel Toss
basic.content: Throws a barrel at enemies that explodes on impact.

basic_upgrades.name: Bongo Barrel
basic_upgrades.content: Release a barrel that creates a musical shockwave.

basic_upgrades.name: Super Donkey Kong
basic_upgrades.content: Transform into a more powerful version of Donkey Kong.

soulgems.name: Barrels of Fun
soulgems.content: A massive barrel attack that causes widespread damage.
